question: The year is 2022. I am at the National Air and Space Museum east of the Potomac River. I want to go to Fire Station 301 DCA ARFF using the metro. I go in the wrong direction and end up at the station closest to Cleveland Elementary School. How many metro stations am I away from my original destination if I don't change lines? Your answer should be a numerical integer value.

research_queries: National Air and Space Museum east of Potomac River metro station Washington DC
Fire Station 301 DCA ARFF Washington DC location metro station
Cleveland Elementary School Washington DC metro station nearest
Washington DC Metro system map lines stations 2022
Metro station distance counting same line Washington DC
working_plan: Identify the National Air and Space Museum east of Potomac River (likely Udvar-Hazy Center) and its nearest metro station
Locate Fire Station 301 DCA ARFF and determine its nearest metro station
Find Cleveland Elementary School in Washington DC area and its nearest metro station
Map the metro line connections and determine which line connects the wrong destination to the intended destination
Count the number of stations between the wrong destination and intended destination on the same metro line

solver.reasoning_summary: The Udvar-Hazy Center connects to Wiehle-Reston East (Silver Line). Fire Station 301 DCA ARFF is at Ronald Reagan Airport station (Blue/Yellow Lines). Cleveland Elementary School is near Shaw-Howard University station (Yellow/Green Lines). Going wrong direction on Yellow Line from downtown transfer point leads to Shaw-Howard instead of Reagan Airport. These stations are approximately 10 stops apart on the Yellow Line without transfers.

issues: REASONING ERROR: Incorrect station count - Shaw-Howard University station is 8 stations away from Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport station on the Yellow Line, not 10

Annotator Metadata.Steps:
1. Google search "National Air and Space Museum".
2. Note there are two National Air and Space Museums. One in Virginia, the other in Washington D.C.
3. Google map search "Potomac River" and zoom out.
4. See that Washington DC is east of the Potomac River.
5. Determine that the National Air and Space Museum refers to the one in Washington D.C.
6. Google search "Metro Station National Air and Space Museum Washington D.C."
7. Clicked on the first result: Getting Here | National Air and Space Museum, https://airandspace.si.edu/visit/museum-dc/directions.
8. Read on the website, "The closest Metrorail stop is at L'Enfant Plaza." Note this location.
6. Google map search "Fire Station 301 DCA ARFF".
7. Zoom out to look for nearby metro stations.
8. The closest station is Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport.
9. Google map search "Cleveland Elementary School".
10. The closest metro station to Cleveland Elementry School is Shaw-Howard Univ Station.
11. Google search "DC Metro Station Map".
12. Clicked on the second result: 2022 System Map, https://www.wmata.com/schedules/maps/upload/2022-System-Map.pdf.
13. Locate L'Enfant Plaza station. It is the transfer station for all color lines.
14. Locate Shaw-Howard Univ stations 4 stops above L'Enfant Plaza station.
15. Locate Ronald Reagan National Airport station on the blue/yellow line.
16. Recall the current location: Shaw-Howard Univ station's yellow/green line.
17. Since the question says no line changes, we deduce the line must be one that Shaw-Howard Univ and Ronald Reagan National Airport stations have in common: yellow line.
18. Begin at Shaw-Howard Univ station and follow the yellow line.
19. Count the number of stops until it reaches Ronald Reagan National Airport station.
20. Final answer: 8.
Annotator Metadata.Tools:
1. Web Browser
2. Search Engine
3. Access to Google Maps
4. Image recognition tools
